verification.symbol_alignment: controller.js consumes window.RulesEngine, window.AIOpponent, window.UIRender; each module sets the matching global in its IIFE wrapper. Names align across all modules.
verification.load_order_alignment: index.html script tags appear in the order specified by Coordinator (rules-engine -> ai-opponent -> ui-render -> controller); CSS link precedes scripts.
verification.path_alignment: index.html references ui-render.css and the four .js files by bare filename; integration directory layout uses identical bare filenames; no rewrites required.
verification.node_smoke_test: Loaded rules-engine + ai-opponent under node, applied 3 moves on a fresh board, confirmed legalMoves and checkOutcome return contract-shaped data, AI.chooseMove returned a legal blocking move on a near-win position.
verification.byte_equivalence_with_tested_sandbox: ai-opponent.js, rules-engine.js, ui-render.js, ui-render.css, controller.js, index.html all match the sandbox copies that the edge-case-testing builder ran 46/46 passing tests against (md5 verified for ai-opponent.js).
